_meta.tagline: Luxury Waterside Residences on Dwarka Expressway
_meta.sourcePolicy: krisumi.com/project/waterside-residences/ + user-provided screenshots only. Brochure pending. Forest Reserve and Waterside are separate sibling projects, no cross-references.

hero.title: Waterside Residences
hero.subtitle: Luxury Waterside Residences on Dwarka Expressway
hero.videoNote: Video hosted on krisumi.com, hotlinked. Filename uses internal Krisumi name 'waterfall-residences'.

atAGlance.configurations: 2 LDK, 2 LDK + S, 3 LDK, 3 LDK + S

paragraphs: Waterside Residences is a premium residential collection within Krisumi City, the 65-acre Indo-Japanese master township in Sector 36A, Gurgaon. Designed by Japan's Nikken Housing System for exteriors and Aoyama Nomura Design for interiors, the project brings considered Japanese craftsmanship to the Dwarka Expressway corridor.

The development offers 2 LDK and 3 LDK apartments along with their +S (servant) variants, with starting prices from ₹4.35 Cr. Tower configurations span Tower 1 with SLDK + Servant layouts, and Tower 2 and Tower 3 with larger penthouse-format units. Construction across Towers 3.1, 3.2 and 3.3 is well into the structural phase as of April 2026.

unitPlans.schemaMapping: carpetAreaSqft -> Krisumi 'carpet'. builtUpAreaSqft -> Krisumi 'exclusive'. saleableAreaSqft preserved here for source-of-truth completeness; if PropertyListingPage schema does not have a saleable field, omit from rendered page.

developerInfo.name: Krisumi Corporation Pvt. Ltd.
developerInfo.summary: Krisumi Corporation is a joint venture between India's Krishna Group and Japan's Sumitomo Corporation, bringing Japanese design sensibility, construction quality and after-sales service to the Indian residential market. Krisumi City in Sector 36A is its flagship 65-acre master township in Gurgaon.

rera.note: HARERA registry shows 4 Krisumi Sector 36A entries: Waterfall Residence (GGM/271/2018/03, Issued 2018), Waterfall Suites (GGM/715/447/2023/59, Issued 2023), plus 2 In-Process registrations under same names. Mapping from 'Waterside Residences' marketing name to legal HARERA registration pending. Candidate RC/REP/HARERA/GGM/812/544/2024/39 from krisumi.com HTML rejected (not in HARERA registry). RERA placeholder must be replaced before merging to main.
rera.blockerSeverity: Must fix before main merge. Acceptable on staging for visual review.
